# opnsense_quagga_bgp_redistribution (Data Source)

Configure redistribution rules for BGP.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID of the resource.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) An optional description for this redistribution rule.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable this redistribution rule.
- `linked_route_map` (String) The route map UUID to apply to redistributed routes.
- `redistribute` (String) The protocol to redistribute into BGP.
